# The Harper building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: the-harper-1415-n-harper-ave
- Address: 1415 N Harper Ave, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/
- Management company: Not clearly disclosed in retrieved public materials
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-30

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (low, evidence count 2)
- Management: 2 (low, evidence count 1)
- Amenity: 1 (high, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 1)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 2

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: unknown
- Pricing risk: high

## Evidence summary
- [review] Apartments.com lists dishwasher, stainless steel appliances, linen closet storage, and balcony or patio space at The Harper. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: Apartment Features list dishwasher, stainless steel appliances, dining room, linen closet, balcony, and patio.
- [review] Apartments.com showed no live availability and asked prospects to check back soon for upcoming listings. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: Pricing section said 'Check Back Soon for Upcoming Availability' and showed the 1-bedroom line as Not Available.
- [review] The Harper FAQ says the property does not offer in-unit laundry or shared laundry facilities. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: The FAQ says 'The Harper does not offer in-unit laundry or shared facilities.'
- [review] The Harper FAQ says the building does not allow pets. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: The FAQ says 'The Harper does not allow pets, though service animals are always welcome in accordance with applicable laws.'
- [review] Public resident-review depth is effectively zero, leaving management quality hard to verify. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: The profile showed 0 reviews and explicitly said 'No Renter Reviews Yet.'
- [review] Apartments.com gives The Harper a 72 SoundScore with busy traffic and active nearby businesses, which suggests side-street quiet is only partial. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-harper-west-hollywood-ca/096fjd3/). Note: The SoundScore section shows 72 overall with Traffic: Busy and Businesses: Active.
- [review] Zumper describes the area as a quiet tree-lined street and mentions dedicated parking, but that signal is thinner and less authoritative than the Apartments.com profile. Source: Zumper (https://www.zumper.com/apartment-buildings/p289890/1415-1417-n-harper-ave-west-hollywood-ca). Note: The public listing copy describes a quiet tree-lined street and dedicated parking.

## Open questions
- None beyond normal unit-level verification.

## Notes
The Harper is a small older West Hollywood building on a good side street, but the public facts currently conflict with core requirements. Apartments.com showed no current availability, the property FAQ said pets are not allowed, and the same FAQ said there is neither in-unit nor shared laundry. Even before pricing uncertainty, that makes it a practical hard stop for this search. Review depth is also effectively zero, so there is not enough counter-evidence to justify keeping it alive.
